subject: WM-0071 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Confirmed WM-0062 through WM-0070 are done with verified reviews; WM-0071 changes are limited to allowed M4 closeout roadmap/project-state/report/task/inbox files; no WM-0072 or M5 task exists. Closeout evidence matches artifacts and rerun gates pass. Reviewer pnpm bench temp run passed with a non-blocking M4 warning at 10.69% over baseline, below the 20% blocking threshold and with no invariant mismatches.
